rumor.detail: WON DANISH SUPERLIGA 2-0 vs Brøndby. AGF first title in 40 years.

newIntel.reasoning: Confirmed official trophy win after existing May 3 rumor of match-winner. New milestone event (first title in 40 years, UEFA CL qualification). Date May 10 is AFTER latest existing rumor (May 3). Passes date gate.

rumor.detail: OM relaunching pursuit, preparing to overbid Watford's ~€1M agreement

Key escalation: deal upgraded from Watford €500k offer to €1M agreement with new Marseille counterbid. Represents material change in negotiation status.
